name: Wesfarmers Limited
analysis: WES's 9-SMA is above the 26 and price has reclaimed them. It is coming off a base, 7% below its one-year high, so there is room to run. Price has broken above the base high at A$87.1100. Trade idea: entry A$87.2700, stop A$77.6853, target A$116.0241 (3.00:1) — then trail it.
